name.value: Lapis Camel Figurine of Wondrous Power

description.value: Price 7,500 gp DESCRIPTION This palm-sized camel figurine is sculpted of lapis lazuli. When you throw the lapis camel to the ground and speak the command word, it turns into a dromedary camel. The camel acts as a normal camel in all respects, except that it obeys your verbal commands to the best of its animal -level intelligence. At your command, the camel returns to its figurine form. The lapis camel can be used up to 3 times per week for up 8 hours each use. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Cost 3,750 gp
